configurations.name: Square QBank (static)
runtimeArgs: const http=require('http'),fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const root=process.cwd();const m={html:'text/html',js:'text/javascript',css:'text/css',json:'application/json',svg:'image/svg+xml',png:'image/png',jpg:'image/jpeg',ico:'image/x-icon',woff2:'font/woff2'};http.createServer((req,res)=>{let u=decodeURIComponent(req.url.split('?')[0]);if(u==='/')u='/index.html';const fp=p.join(root,u);fs.readFile(fp,(e,d)=>{if(e){res.writeHead(404);res.end('Not found');}else{const ext=fp.split('.').pop().toLowerCase();res.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':m[ext]||'application/octet-stream'});res.end(d);}});}).listen(3000,()=>console.log('Square QBank on http://localhost:3000'));
